expectations.text: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
expectations.evidence: Found 17 data-testid attributes: stat-card-{id}, activity-item-{id}, filter-type-select, filter-date-from/to, filter-clear, filter-type-option-{type}

expectations.text: Images use data-asset placeholder convention (not placeholder URLs)
expectations.evidence: No data-asset attributes found. Uses deterministic avatar colors from name hash instead of placeholder images

expectations.text: Zustand state in dedicated store file with selector hooks (no bare useStore)
expectations.evidence: useDashboardFilterStore.ts with 7 selector hooks (useDateRange, useSelectedTypes, useFilterActions, useFiltersSnapshot). Zero bare useStore() calls

expectations.text: Page decomposed into multiple focused components (not monolithic)
expectations.evidence: 15 files total: 8 TSX components + 7 TS modules (types, api, store, queries, utils)

expectations.text: Uses Tailwind v4 patterns (shadow-xs, inset-ring, focus-visible:, @theme)
expectations.evidence: 4 Tailwind v4 patterns found including focus-visible: states
Zero instances of ': any', 'as any', or '<any>' found

expectations.text: Responsive design with mobile breakpoint handling
expectations.evidence: 3 responsive breakpoint classes. Stat cards grid adapts across breakpoints
